productDisplayName: Red Tape Men Black Formal Shoes
description: Stylish to the T, these dress shoes from red tape are perfect for all formal occasions. Slip into these great oxfords to look like you mean business. The pointed toe silhouette adds to the charm of these shoes, coupled with a perforated pattern. Wear them to look suave in a jiffy! A great addition to any sophisticated man's wardrobe, it can add tons of character to your outfit in an instant.UpperFull-grain leather upper for added durability and stylePointed toe design for stylish look and comfortPerforated pattern for added styleLace-up system with synthetic laces for a snug, customized FitCT padded tongue to protect from excessive rubbing and prevent blistersLeather wrap-around overlay along the heel and midfoot for better supportMidsolePU midsole for lightweight comfort and supportLeather inner to absorb moisture and keep feet dryOutsoleLightweight, slip-resistant TPU outsole for better shock absorptionRaised heel for ergonomic comfort and styleTextured grooves on the forefoot and branding embossed on the heel for better tractionshoe careWipe surface with dry, clean cloth to remove dustUse a branded leather conditioner to maintain shineDo not store in direct sunlight
